description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a cylindrical body and a narrow neck, topped with a blue cap. The bottle is predominantly white and features a rectangular blue label on the front, which includes a cartoonish animal face and some text. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting it is made of glass or plastic. The cap is a solid blue color and fits snugly over the neck. The bottle is free of any visible damage or deformation, and there are no clear indications of liquid inside. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for beverages or similar contents.
description: A tall, white bottle with a blue cap and a blue label featuring a cartoon animal face. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue label with a cartoon animal face and text, as well as the blue cap.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing most of the label and the blue cap, with the label partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bottle, with the label not visible and only the plain white surface and blue cap in view.
description_view_3: Another rear-side view, showing the plain white back of the bottle and the blue cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: A blue rectangular label with a cartoon animal face and some text, placed on the front of the bottle.
